title: Simple Animations
description: Turn your boring gameplay to a more captivating, enhanced gameplay with Simple Animations!
body: **_Note: Simple Animations might not recieve any further updates for latest minecraft versions. Effective until further notice._** ![SA Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25fe9d1512056cca6c6040e98046534b6e4efa2.png) # Future Pack Update Progress ![65% done for next pack update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afad23a56f311d61fa7010bebad2e217a7c194ea.png) ## Loaders **Simple Animations** is solely based on **_Fabric_**. This modpack **will not** work on other loaders. Modpack tested on **Modrinth Launcher** so far. ## Features **Player Animations:** Adapts to any skin. **Important: If your skin isn't showing, maybe your resource packs are out of orders. And if that doesnt help,** Google it. ![Player Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d3b013021296e329a018ae8db4b702a529d3a9.png) **Block Animations:** Adds particles to many blocks. ![Block Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8698a8963daefa4acdf0eba4b289ec7ffd6de4ce.png) **QoL:** Adds many Quality of life (QoL) mods! ![QoL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f510aad50f018040c1c5dc2d1b9fa5415c593b44.png) **Optimization:** _Simple Animation_ has built in optimization mods! ![Optimization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc7243967bed3ca4deb0f5e36dee7e36db3e691c.png) ## Installation Guide Here's a quick guide on how to install this modpack on **Modrinth Launcher**, but other launchers should have similar options. **_Note: Go to "Gallery" and see step by step with instructions of this installation guide._** ![Step 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824379d79a1fec08831a90b794a271fc6e107f30.png) ![Step 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1671e2d5f70bc9939ae5637f80765633e991f65e.png) ![Step 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e6814c2f305e9090b5ff85310c860e97d583f5a.png) ![Step 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc7e2adb862b7dac5f6ca9647762c705962fc5e.png) ## Mods - [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) by Grend: Adds fancy advancement animation. - [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) by creativemd: Adds Ambient noises - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) by squeek502: Adds information about saturation & more. - [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) by qendolin: Adds beautiful looking clouds without shaders. - [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) by vladmarica: Shows each player's ping in a server as actual numbers. - [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) by TheCSDev: Improves the default minecraft statistics screen. - [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) by Motschen: Adds blur to the background of every UI in game. - [Bounced](https://modrinth.com/mod/bounced) by KrLite: Makes your Minecraft Title bounce on log-in and when you click. - [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) by LizIsTired: Adds dust particles to caves. - [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) by Ezzenix: Adds a smooth animation when new chat messages appear. - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) by dzwdz: Adds player heads to chat messages. - [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) by TheIllusiveC4: Adds the ability to favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds. - [Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in) by kerudion: Adds fade-in animation for chunks - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by shedaniel: Config screen API. - [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) by creativemd: Core mod. - [Easy Anvils ](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) by Fuzs: Makes anvil easier to use. - [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) by Fuzs: Makes enchanting easier. - [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) by theoness1: Adds eating animation to the game. - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by FoundationGames: Turns entities into blocks to enhance fps & reduce lag. - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by tr7zw: Hides entites that are not the player's view. - [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) by Superkat32: Enhances tnt & creeper explosions. - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) by Traben: Adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Models. - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) by Traben: Adds many new Entity Texture Features, including entity and player skin features. - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by modmuss50: Essential hooks for modding with Fabric. - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by modmuss50: Enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods. - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) by randommcsomethin: Adds falling leaves particle to trees and not just cherry trees. - [Fancy Block Particles - Renewed](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed) by Hantonik: Turns basic 2D particles in vanilla Minecraft into cool 3D animated particles. - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by malte0811: Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways. - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) by Fuzs: Modding library for mod developers that provides both NeoForge's & Forge's whole config system to other modding ecosystems. - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX: Resource pack that gives an animation overhaul to the creatures in the default look of Minecraft. - [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) by TrasTick: A resource pack to animate the players. - [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) by Grend: Library for other mods, it doesn't do anything by itself. - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by RaphiMC: Improves the immediate mode rendering performance of the client. - [ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) by netcatgirl: Makes thunders immersive. - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by comp500: An addon for the rendering optimisation mod Sodium. - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by coderbot: Adds shader support to fabric. - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by jellysquid3: Improves gameplay when playing multiplayer. - [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-but-3d) by Volery: Makes the mace 3D. - [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) by Tschipcraft: Makes bubble particles pop. - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector: Lets you view the mods you have installed. - [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) by JackFred: Increases the maximum length of the chat history, from the vanilla 100 messages to 16384. - [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) by Steveplays: Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience. - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by tr7zw: Adds animations to certain actions. - [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) by natanfudge: Gives more info when game crashes. - [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) by Fuzs: Adds a pick up log. - [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) by Sollace: An Overly complicated Sound Mod. - [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) by Fuzs: A light-weight library. - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by FlashyReese: Replaces Sodium's Options Screen with intention of improving UX. - [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) by Johni0702: Allows you to record, replay and share your gaming experience. - [Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) by comp500: Copies screenshots that you take to your clipboard. - [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/shoulder-surfing-reloaded) by Exopandora: Highly configurable third person camera mod for minecraft. - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) by MisterPeModder: Allows you to see a preview window of a shulker box contents. - [Smooth Gui](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui) by Ezzenix: GUIs fade up when opened. - [Smooth Scrolling Refurbished](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scrolling-refurbished) by JustAlittleWolf: This mod changes the scrollbar in any screen that uses it to be smooth. - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3: Powerful rendering engine and optimization mod. - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by FlashyReese: Adds extra features to sodium. - [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) by henkelmax: Provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks. - [TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons) by TheCSDev: Minecraft modding API library. - [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by Patbox: Allows creation and parsing placeholders within strings and Minecraft Text Components. - [Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-item-animations) by Trivaxy: This mod adds little animations when you pick up or insert items with your mouse. - [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) by AmongstReality: Adds dark UIs with their own textures. - [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh) by limesplatus: Quality of life expansion. - [Visual Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-overhaul) by Motschen: Overhauls the visuals of certain vanilla blocks. - [Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench) by Fuzs: Adds visual animations to workbenchs. - [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) by PinkGoosik: Simple client-sided cosmetic mod. - [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) by Goby56: Adds wakes when you're in water. - [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) by isxander: This mod was made to fill a hole in this area of Fabric modding. - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) by isxander: Adds zoom to Minecraft. ## Socials Check out my other socials for more contents and pack updates. _I may not be active or post all time_ [](https://www.youtube.com/@CreppyMC) [](https://x.com/@_Creppy) [](https://solo.to/creppymc) [](https://linktr.ee/creppymc) [](https://github.com/creppymc)
